forecasts.raw_text: NE winds 15 to 20 kt with gusts up to 25 kt. Seas 3 to 4 ft, occasionally to 6 ft. Wave detail: N 3 ft at 5 seconds. A slight chance of tstms late this morning. Showers late this morning and early afternoon, then a chance of showers late.
